title: Arlong Park Erupts
description: On pages 1–4, arlong park erupts focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as the Straw Hats crash into Arlong Park, and the fight against Arlong’s fish-men begins in earnest.
scene: On pages 1–4, arlong park erupts focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as the Straw Hats crash into Arlong Park, and the fight against Arlong’s fish-men begins in earnest.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: to think that there would actually be humans who can handle fishmen...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Is this really a battle of our world...?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: If this was how things were going to turn out, we should have fought from the beginning.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Arlong, please just sit right there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: If we let you fight while that much enraged,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: All of along park will end up destroyed!

dialogue.speaker: Hatchan
dialogue.text: That octopus is doing some- thing.

dialogue.speaker: Hatchan
dialogue.text: First boil the octopus in salt water, slice it up, and add some olive oil and paprika to make an excellent side dish while drinking.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Uhh guys, hear me out. I'm in a bit of a pickle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You dumbass! Why didn't you dodge that!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But you're the one who did that to yourself!

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
